DocumentationConfig.description: Configure documentation framework, features, and writing style.

enable_mermaid.description: Use Mermaid for diagrams and charts
enable_mermaid.title: Enable Mermaid

framework.description: Documentation framework (e.g. mkdocs, vitepress, docusaurus, sphinx)
framework.title: Framework

style.description: Documentation writing style (e.g. diataxis, google, microsoft, minimal)
style.title: Style

DocumentationConfig.title: DocumentationConfig

ignore.description: List of gitignore-style patterns to exclude from file discovery. Patterns support wildcards and are combined with .gitignore rules.
ignore.title: Ignore

enable.description: Whether the gateway server starts at boot
enable.title: Enable

host.description: Hostname to bind the gateway server to
host.title: Host

port.description: Port to bind the gateway server to (0 lets the OS choose an available port)
port.title: Port

GitConfig.description:
Configuration for git domain operations and conventional commit behavior.

Controls features like scope selection, breaking change detection, and commit
message body generation for AI-powered git commits.

enable_scopes.description: Enable scope selection for conventional commits
enable_scopes.title: Enable Scopes

enable_breaking_changes.description: Enable breaking change detection and confirmation
enable_breaking_changes.title: Enable Breaking Changes

max_description_length.description: Maximum character length for commit descriptions
max_description_length.title: Max Description Length

GitConfig.title: GitConfig

LLMConfig.description: LLM domain configuration with provider-specific settings.
LLMConfig.title: LLMConfig

LLMModelConfig.description: Configuration for a specific LLM model.

extra_params.description: Additional parameters to pass to the model initialization
extra_params.title: Extra Params

LLMModelConfig.title: LLMModelConfig

command.description: Command and arguments to execute for linting (e.g., ['ruff', 'check', '--fix']). Use {file} placeholder to specify where the file path should be inserted, otherwise it will be appended to the end.
command.title: Command

languages.description: List of language names this command handles (e.g., ['python', 'php']). Empty list means all files.
languages.title: Languages

LintConfig.description: Lint domain configuration with validation and defaults.

enable.description: Enable or disable the linting functionality
enable.title: Enable

commands.description: List of lint commands to run on files with their target extensions
commands.title: Commands

LintConfig.title: LintConfig

id.description: Unique identifier for the preset, used in /preset <id> command
id.title: Id

read_only_files.description: Files to add to read-only context
read_only_files.title: Read Only Files

editable_files.description: Files to add to editable context
editable_files.title: Editable Files

prompt.description: Preset prompt to load into chat input
prompt.title: Prompt

load_on_boot.description: Automatically load this preset when byte starts
load_on_boot.title: Load On Boot

TUIConfig.description: TUI domain configuration with validation and defaults.

ui_theme.description: Catppuccin theme variant for the CLI interface (mocha/macchiato are dark, latte is light, frappe is cool dark)
ui_theme.title: Ui Theme

syntax_theme.description: Pygments theme for code block syntax highlighting in CLI output
syntax_theme.title: Syntax Theme

TUIConfig.title: TUIConfig

enable.description: Enable file watching for AI comment markers (AI:, AI@, AI?, AI!). When enabled, Byte automatically detects changes and processes AI instructions.
enable.title: Enable

WebConfig.description:
Configuration for web browser automation and scraping.

Defines settings for headless Chrome browser operations including
binary location and browser behavior customization.

chrome_binary_location.description: Path to Chrome/Chromium binary executable for headless browser automation
chrome_binary_location.title: Chrome Binary Location

WebConfig.title: WebConfig

documentation.description: Documentation framework, features, and writing style configuration

files.description: File discovery, watching, and ignore pattern configuration

git.description: Git operations and conventional commit behavior configuration

llm.description: LLM provider and model assignment configuration

tui.description: Terminal UI theme and syntax highlighting configuration

web.description: Web browser automation and scraping configuration
